title: Makefile missing tidy target for go mod tidy + go mod verify
makefile_snippet:
fmt: ## Format Go source
	go fmt ./...
test: ## Run tests
	go test -race ./...
lint: ## Lint code
	golangci-lint run
clean: ## Remove artifacts
	rm -rf bin/
expected_feedback: add tidy target: go mod tidy + go mod verify to keep module dependencies clean and reproducible
